description_long: This is a finely detailed bust sculpture of a mature man with a stern expression, featuring a full mustache and receding hairline. The figure is dressed in formal attire, including a bow tie and jacket, and the bust is mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The surface appears to be smooth and matte, with subtle textural details in the hair and clothing folds. The front of the pedestal is inscribed with text, possibly a name or date, though it is not fully legible. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with simplified hair and clothing contours. The overall color is a uniform off-white, suggesting it is made from plaster or marble.
description: A detailed off-white bust of a mature man in formal attire, mounted on a rectangular pedestal with an inscription. The sculpture features realistic facial details and smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, formal attire, and the inscribed pedestal.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the man's facial features, hair, and the side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, simplified hair, and the back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the opposite side of the face, hair, and pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
